zu.t: n. 巴比伦神话中的风雨神
zu.d: n. evil storm god represented as a black bird

zucchettos.t: 无边帽( zucchetto的名词复数 )

zucchini.d:
n. marrow squash plant whose fruit are eaten when small
n. small cucumber-shaped vegetable marrow; typically dark green

zuckerkandl's convoiution.t: [医] 祖克坎德尔氏回(胼骶下回)

zuckerkandl's fascia.t: [医] 祖克坎德耳氏筋膜(肾后筋膜)

zuckerkandl's glnnds.t: [医] 祖克坎德耳氏腺, 主动脉旁体(副神经节)

zuckerman.t: n. (Zuckerman)人名；(德)楚克曼；(英)朱克曼

zug.t: n. 楚格州（瑞士中部的州）；楚格（瑞士楚格州首府）；（德）火车

zugsmith's sign.t: [医] 祖格斯密斯氏征(胃癌和胃溃疡的一种体征)

zuica.t: 珠伊卡酒(罗马尼亚产低酒度白兰地, 以野生李为原料, 酒度36°)

zuider zee.t: 须德海（即荷兰艾瑟尔湖）

zuk.t: ZUK是神奇工场旗下的智能终端品牌。ZUK崇尚直觉带给人的简单感受, 科技与艺术的完美融合。

zukerman.t: [网络] 祖克曼；扎克曼；朱克曼

zulfikar.t: n. (Zulfikar)人名；(阿拉伯、巴基)佐勒菲卡尔

zulu.d:
n. a member of the tall Negroid people of eastern South Africa; some live in KwaZulu-Natal under the traditional clan system but many now work in the cities
n. a community of Negroid people in eastern South Africa
n. a Bantu language of considerable literary importance in southeastern Africa

zululand.t: n. 祖鲁兰(南非地名, 旧时为祖鲁王国)

zulus.t: n. 祖鲁人（南非班图人的成员）( Zulu的名词复数 ); 祖鲁语
zulus.d:
n. pl. The most important tribe belonging to the Kaffir race.
   They inhabit a region on the southeast coast of Africa, but formerly
   occupied a much more extensive country. They are noted for their
   warlike disposition, courage, and military skill.

zumba.t: n. 尊巴（舞）; 南美一种舞蹈; 最新引进了来自南美的健身舞蹈尊巴(Zumba); [地名] [厄瓜多尔] 孙巴

zumbooruk.d:
n. A small cannon supported by a swiveled rest on the back
   of a camel, whence it is fired, -- used in the East.

zund-burguet apparatus.t: [医] 宗-布二氏器, 电声器, 电助听训练器

zund-burguet treatment.t: [医] 宗-布二氏疗法(电声疗聋法)

zune.t: n. （品牌名, 微软开发的一款音乐播放器）

zuni.t: n. 祖尼语,(居住在新墨西哥的普韦布洛印地安人的)祖尼人
zuni.d: n a member of the Pueblo people living in western New Mexico

zunis.t: [地名] [伊朗] 祖尼斯（佐努兹的旧称）

zunyite.d:
n. A fluosilicate of alumina occurring in tetrahedral
   crystals at the Zu/i mine in Colorado.

zupack.t: 密封复合纸(方)盒(用萨冉-牛皮纸-聚乙烯复合纸热封而成)

zuppa inglese.t: n. <意>英式甜羹; 英式点心

zur.t: abbr. Zurich 苏黎世; Zurigo (Italian=Zurich) （意大利语）苏黎世; Zurab 祖拉勃（男子名）; Zurr 祖尔（姓氏）

zurich.d: n. the largest city in Switzerland; located in the northern part of the country

zurs.t: (zur 的第三人称 -s形式) abbr. Zurich 苏黎世; Zurigo (Italian=Zurich) （意大利语）苏黎世; Zurab 祖拉勃（男子名）; Zurr 祖尔（姓氏）

zurvan.t: [网络] 祖尔宛；祖以万；祖尔万

zus.d: n. evil storm god represented as a black bird
